title: registry loop-first vertical
manager: Before building any marketplace, prove the research-grade core on a tiny vertical: an agent states a contract, queries, assembles a composite, gets a green proof or a minimal counterexample, and swaps a part under refinement. If that loop isn't cheap enough for an agent's inner loop, the whole thesis is hollow — so prove it on a narrow slice before indexing anything. This is the registry's make-or-break experiment, deliberately done small first rather than built out on faith.
cs: slice per registry-close: TS/JS only, hierarchical operator only, checkable band only, author-claimed + one registry-verified(ts-js) path, counterexample traces, adapter-as-proof-carrying-component, skeletal third-party adjunct binding (namespace+hash); THEN the wider marketplace.
